sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Ascent Group LLC Has $14.07 Million Position in Johnson & Johnson $JNJ
feed.summary: Ascent Group LLC increased its stake in Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) by 7.2% in the fourth quarter, now holding 68,009 shares valued at $14.07 million. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in JNJ, which has seen insider selling totaling over $7.36 million in the last ninety days. Analysts currently rate Johnson & Johnson as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus price target of $237.57, highlighting positive sentiment from recent price target increases and commercial milestones.

feed.title: Apple Inc. $AAPL Stock Position Lowered by Acropolis Investment Management LLC
feed.summary: Acropolis Investment Management LLC reduced its stake in Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) by 5.2% during the fourth quarter, selling 4,979 shares and retaining 90,598 shares valued at $24.63 million. This adjustment makes Apple the firm's 20th-largest position. The stock is facing near-term pressure due to reports of engineering issues with the foldable iPhone and IP/legal risks in China, while insiders like CEO Tim Cook and SVP Deirdre O'Brien have also sold shares under pre-arranged plans.

feed.title: Ascent Group LLC Cuts Stock Holdings in Fifth Third Bancorp $FITB
feed.summary: Ascent Group LLC significantly reduced its stake in Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) by 73.8% in the fourth quarter, selling 46,429 shares and holding 16,486 shares valued at $772,000. Despite this, other institutional investors have bought and sold shares, with institutional ownership reaching 83.79%. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for FITB with an average target price of $56.16, and the company recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.40 per share.

feed.title: Azzad Asset Management Inc. ADV Buys 16,230 Shares of Fortinet, Inc. $FTNT
feed.summary: Azzad Asset Management Inc. ADV significantly increased its stake in Fortinet, Inc. (NASDAQ:FTNT) by 418.7% in the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 16,230 shares to bring its total to 20,106 shares valued at $1,597,000. Other major institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc., Van ECK Associates Corp, and First Trust Advisors LP also raised their holdings in the cybersecurity company. Fortinet's stock currently has a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts, with a consensus price target of $87.84.

feed.title: Asio Capital LLC Makes New $3.42 Million Investment in Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. $REGN
feed.summary: Asio Capital LLC has initiated a new $3.42 million investment in Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc., acquiring 4,434 shares in the fourth quarter. This comes as other institutional investors have also adjusted their positions in the biopharmaceutical company. Meanwhile, company insiders have sold shares totaling over $2.9 million in the last ninety days, though 7.02% of the stock is still insider-owned.

feed.title: FedEx Launches Import Tool to Boost Imports In Saudi Arabia
feed.summary: FedEx has launched the FedEx Import Tool (FiT) in Saudi Arabia to help businesses manage increasing import volumes more efficiently. This digital solution centralizes document management, offers shipment tracking, provides proactive notifications, and includes a direct payment feature for customs duties. The initiative aligns with Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030 by enhancing trade facilitation and economic diversification.

feed.title: Ascent Group LLC Buys 3,501 Shares of Western Digital Corporation $WDC
feed.summary: Ascent Group LLC increased its stake in Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) by 135.0% during the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 3,501 shares to bring its total holdings to 6,095 shares valued at $1.05 million. This move is part of broader institutional investor activity, with several other hedge funds also modifying their positions in the data storage provider. Western Digital reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and has received multiple "Buy" ratings and price target increases from equities research analysts.

feed.title: BlackRock, State Street Challenge Invesco's Nasdaq-100 ETF Dominance
feed.summary: BlackRock and State Street have filed regulatory documents to launch new Nasdaq 100 ETFs, posing a significant challenge to Invesco's long-standing dominance in this market. While expense ratios are yet to be disclosed for the new funds, they are expected to be a key competitive factor against Invesco's existing QQQ and QQQM ETFs, potentially attracting substantial investor inflows. These new offerings could disrupt the market for Nasdaq 100 tracking funds, which have seen significant growth and returns.

feed.title: VITL Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Vital Farms, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit Filed by The Rosen Law Firm
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is reminding purchasers of Vital Farms, Inc. (NASDAQ: VITL) securities that the lead plaintiff deadline for a securities fraud class action lawsuit is May 26, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Vital Farms made misleading statements and failed to disclose risks related to delays in the roll-out of its new ERP system, which led to missed earnings guidance. Investors who purchased VITL securities between May 8, 2025, and February 26, 2026, may be entitled to compensation and are encouraged to contact the law firm.

feed.title: PPL (NYSE:PPL) Stock Crosses Above 200-Day Moving Average - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: PPL (NYSE:PPL) stock recently crossed above its 200-day moving average, trading at $38.83 against the average of $36.54, indicating a bullish technical signal. Analysts generally have a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $41.17, although some firms adjusted their targets. The company reported slightly missed quarterly EPS by $0.01 but saw revenue increase 2.8% year-over-year, and it raised its quarterly dividend to $0.285.

feed.title: Virginia National Bankshares (NASDAQ:VABK) Shares Up 0.7% - Still a Buy?
feed.summary: Virginia National Bankshares (NASDAQ:VABK) saw its shares increase by 0.7%, trading at $38.63. The company has a current "Hold" rating from analysts, including a recent downgrade from "buy" to "hold" by Weiss Ratings. VABK reported quarterly EPS of $1.10 on $13.43 million in revenue, a P/E ratio of 10.88, and offers a 3.7% annual dividend yield, which may appeal to income-focused investors.

feed.title: Coca Cola Bubbles return to Marriott properties after 35 years
feed.summary: Marriott International has signed a new global agreement with The Coca-Cola Company, making Coke the exclusive beverage provider for its properties after 35 years of being in the Pepsi camp. This transition will see all Pepsi products replaced with Coca-Cola beverages across Marriott's over 9,800 properties worldwide, beginning this summer. The switch is primarily driven by guest preference, with over 70% of Bonvoy members reportedly preferring Coke products, and also includes significant financial incentives for Marriott.

feed.title: Allspring Global Investments Holdings LLC Sells 77,890 Shares of Iron Mountain Incorporated $IRM
feed.summary: Allspring Global Investments Holdings LLC significantly reduced its stake in Iron Mountain Incorporated (NYSE:IRM) by 69.7% in Q4, selling 77,890 shares and retaining 33,891 shares valued at $2.82 million. Company insiders, including CEO William Meaney, also sold a substantial number of shares, totaling 451,648 shares worth approximately $48.3 million over the past 90 days. Despite these sales and a high dividend payout ratio of 720.83%, Iron Mountain carries a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with a $122 price target.

feed.title: General Motors recalls over 270,000 cars in US over rearview camera issue
feed.summary: General Motors is recalling 271,770 vehicles in the U.S. due to a rearview camera issue that can cause a distorted or blank image, reducing driver visibility. The recall, announced by the U.S. National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA), specifically includes Chevrolet Malibu sedans. Dealers will inspect and replace the faulty rearview cameras to resolve the problem.

feed.title: Adobe Summit 2026: The Enterprise Playbook For AI-Driven Customer Orchestration
feed.summary: Adobe Summit 2026, held from April 19-22 in Las Vegas, will focus on agentic AI-driven customer orchestration and the shift from experience management to intelligent orchestration. The event will launch new AI tools and platforms, featuring keynotes from industry leaders like Jensen Huang and Shailesh Jejurikar, and will guide enterprises in leveraging AI for unified customer journeys. It emphasizes the importance of moving from isolated AI experiments to measurable, enterprise-wide impact, offering strategic sessions and networking for digital experience makers.

feed.title: Why Venture Global, Inc. Class A Shares Are Sinking
feed.summary: Venture Global, Inc. Class A (VG) shares are declining due to the evaporation of a geopolitical risk premium that previously boosted the stock, driven by progress in US-Iran ceasefire talks and subsequent easing of global LNG and oil prices. Additional downward pressure comes from notable insider selling, indicating waning confidence from company insiders. The stock's sentiment is also negatively impacted by a weak financial outlook for 2026, raising concerns about growth and profitability in a cooling energy price environment.

feed.title: Tejon Ranch Co. (TRC) director receives 1,113-share stock grant at $18.84
feed.summary: Tejon Ranch Co. director Anthony L. Leggio was granted 1,113 shares of common stock at $18.84 per share on April 7, 2026, increasing his direct holdings to 57,399 shares. This transaction was a compensation-related acquisition, not an open-market purchase or sale. The Form 4 filing provides details of this insider trading activity.

feed.title: RTX : The Netherlands awards RTX’s Raytheon a $627 million contract for Patriot air and missile defense equipment
feed.summary: Raytheon, an RTX business, has secured a $627 million direct commercial sales contract to provide the Netherlands with Patriot air and missile defense system equipment. This contract includes radars, launchers, and command and control stations. Raytheon is accelerating production to meet the global demand for these critical defense systems, which are currently used by 19 countries.

feed.title: Deere & Company Reaches Settlement in Repair Services Antitrust Litigation
feed.summary: Deere & Company has settled a multidistrict "right to repair" antitrust lawsuit, agreeing to deposit funds into a class settlement fund and continue providing customers and service providers with access to repair resources like tools, manuals, and diagnostic software. The company emphasizes its commitment to customer choice and access to repair capabilities for their equipment. This settlement concludes the 2022 complaint without a finding of wrongdoing, pending court approval.
feed.source: AG INFORMATION NETWORK OF THE WEST

feed.title: ONEOK Inc stock: Morgan Stanley's bold $113 target signals upside potential
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has raised its price target for ONEOK Inc. to $113 with an overweight rating, foreseeing a 25% upside due to strong earnings and growth prospects. ONEOK, a midstream energy leader focused on natural gas and NGLs, operates on a fee-based model, providing stability and an attractive dividend yield for global investors. Analysts maintain a generally optimistic outlook, highlighting the company's strategic positioning in high-growth areas and its robust financial health.

feed.title: Teledyne Labtech Accelerates Prototype and Early‑Programme PCB Builds with New Rapid Quote‑to‑Manufacture Service
feed.summary: Teledyne Labtech has launched a new Rapid Quote-to-Manufacture service designed to speed up the delivery of prototype PCBs for early-stage RF and microwave programs. This service addresses production bottlenecks by offering faster pricing, reduced lead times, and quicker manufacturing, with PCBs shipping in as little as five days. The initiative aims to help customers move designs into hardware more rapidly without compromising the quality for which Labtech is known.

feed.title: Teledyne FLIR boosts AI power for combat drones
feed.summary: Teledyne FLIR has upgraded its Prism SKR software to enhance the autonomy and intelligence of combat drones, transforming it from a targeting tool into a comprehensive autonomy platform. This update introduces features like pixel-lock targeting for persistent tracking in signal-denied environments and enables closed-loop mission management, significantly improving drone capabilities in military operations. The software is designed to adapt in real-time, blend human and AI control, and integrates with existing developer tools for easier deployment.

feed.title: New Teledyne service aims to ship prototype circuit boards in 5 days
feed.summary: Teledyne Labtech has launched a new Rapid Quote-to-Manufacture service designed to expedite the production of prototype RF and microwave circuit boards. This service aims to significantly reduce lead times and improve pricing transparency for early-stage programs, with PCBs shipping in as little as five days. It addresses customer feedback regarding production bottlenecks by streamlining workflows and leveraging over 40 years of expertise in high-reliability PCB manufacturing.

feed.title: Trio Petroleum (TPET) Stock Falls Over 21% After Hours: What's Driving The Move?
feed.summary: Trio Petroleum Corp (TPET) stock dropped over 21% in after-hours trading following a regulatory update regarding its ongoing at-the-market (ATM) equity offering program. The company filed Amendment No. 7 to its prospectus, indicating that approximately $893,000 worth of shares remain available for sale after having sold over $20 million worth of stock previously. This ongoing dilution activity is speculated to be a primary driver for the negative price movement.

feed.title: First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) Given Average Rating of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from 35 brokerages, with an average 12-month price target of $247.17. Analyst actions have been mixed, with some cutting price targets due to inflation and logistical pressures, while others raised them. Despite some insider selling, the company reported strong revenue growth and net margins, though EPS missed expectations.

feed.title: Sun Communities, Inc. (NYSE:SUI) Receives Average Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" from Brokerages
feed.summary: Seventeen analysts have given Sun Communities, Inc. (NYSE:SUI) an average "Moderate Buy" rating, with ten analysts recommending "buy," six "hold," and one "sell." The average 12-month price target is set at $140.17. The company recently reported quarterly earnings of $1.40 per share, exceeding consensus estimates, and raised its quarterly dividend to $1.12.

feed.title: Jefferies sees limited downside for Deere after 15% pullback, upgrades to Hold
feed.summary: Jefferies has upgraded Deere & Company (NYSE: DE) to Hold from Underperform, citing a more balanced risk-reward profile after a 15% pullback in the stock price. The firm maintains its $550 price target, expecting limited further downside. Despite the upgrade, Jefferies foresees a prolonged trough in the agricultural equipment market through 2026, with farmer economics remaining a key concern due to increased input costs and declining farm income projections.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR) Receives Average Recommendation of "Hold" from Analysts
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR) has received an average recommendation of "Hold" from analysts, with five rating it a hold and four a buy, and an average one-year target price of $97.43. The company recently exceeded quarterly earnings expectations and provided an optimistic FY2026 EPS guidance, yet insiders have been net sellers, offloading a significant volume of shares. Institutional investors have shown mixed activity, with some increasing their stakes while the stock currently trades at $79.44.

feed.title: Salesforce pushes Slackbot to make Korea enterprise work OS with AI - CHOSUNBIZ
feed.summary: This article announces that Salesforce, through its Slackbot, is aiming to establish an enterprise work operating system in Korea, integrating AI technology. The initiative signifies Salesforce's strategic move to enhance workplace productivity and digital transformation in the Korean market.

feed.title: Archer Daniels Midland Company (NYSE:ADM) Given Consensus Rating of "Reduce" by Analysts
feed.summary: Archer Daniels Midland Company (NYSE:ADM) has received a consensus "Reduce" rating from analysts, with an average 12-month price target of $62.00. This follows mixed quarterly results, including an EPS beat but a revenue miss, and ongoing uncertainty due to SEC accounting allegations against its former CFO. Despite some analysts raising price targets, significant insider selling has also occurred.

feed.title: General Mills, Inc. (NYSE:GIS) Receives Consensus Recommendation of "Reduce" from Analysts
feed.summary: Analysts have given General Mills, Inc. (NYSE:GIS) a consensus "Reduce" rating, with an average 1-year price target of $43.56. The company recently missed earnings expectations, reporting a 0.64 EPS against an expected 0.73, and revenue declined 8.4% year-over-year. Despite a quarterly dividend implying a 6.6% yield, analysts have lowered price targets following these results, indicating a cautious outlook for the stock.

feed.title: U.S. Vegan Climate ETF (BATS:VEGN) Shares Up 0.5% – Should You Buy?
feed.summary: The U.S. Vegan Climate ETF (VEGN) saw its shares rise by 0.5% on Tuesday, closing at $58.38 after trading as high as $58.38. The firm has a market capitalization of $125.52 million and recently saw Redmont Wealth Advisors LLC purchase a new position of 4,281 shares. VEGN is an exchange-traded fund tracking a principles-based index of U.S. equities and is managed by Beyond.

feed.title: SUGP Technical Analysis | Trend, Signals & Chart Patterns | SU GROUP HOLDINGS LTD-A (NASDAQ:SUGP)
feed.summary: The technical analysis for SU GROUP HOLDINGS LTD-A (SUGP) indicates a poor performance with an overall technical rating of 0 out of 10. Both long and short-term trends are negative, and the stock is lagging behind the market and its industry peers. Despite the negative technical rating, there is a potential setup opportunity due to recent price consolidation and reduced volatility.

feed.title: Tigo Energy GO Battery: Modular Home Storage for Europe | 2026 - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Tigo Energy has launched a new modular residential energy storage system, the GO Battery, specifically designed for the European market. It features individual 3.68 kilowatt-hour battery units, scalable from 7.3 kWh to 47.9 kWh, and uses lithium iron phosphate chemistry with an IP65 rating. The system is compatible with Tigo's EI Inverter and app, supports both single and three-phase configurations, and includes an integrated heating function for cold weather operation.

feed.title: Stoke Therapeutics Adds Veteran Leader to Board, R&D Oversight
feed.summary: Stoke Therapeutics announced the appointment of Dr. Clare Kahn as an independent Class I director to its board, expanding it to ten members. Dr. Kahn brings over 30 years of experience in drug development and regulatory affairs, which Stoke plans to leverage as it advances its Phase 3 trials for zorevunersen, an RNA-based therapy for Dravet syndrome. This strategic move aims to strengthen the company's governance and R&D oversight during a critical phase for its lead therapeutic candidate.

feed.title: SmartFinancial (NASDAQ: SMBK) outlines 2026 proxy votes and board pay
feed.summary: SmartFinancial (NASDAQ: SMBK) has issued its definitive proxy statement (DEF 14A) for its annual shareholder meeting on May 21, 2026. Shareholders will vote on the election of 10 board members, the ratification of Elliott Davis, PLLC as the independent auditor for 2026, and an advisory vote on executive compensation. The Board recommends voting "FOR" all proposals, highlighting continued strong shareholder support for executive compensation (99% in 2025).

feed.title: Texas Roadhouse, Inc. (NASDAQ:TXRH) Given Average Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Texas Roadhouse, Inc. (NASDAQ:TXRH) has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from twenty-four analysts, with an average 12-month price target of $196.70. The company recently reported quarterly earnings of $1.28 EPS, missing estimates, and revenue of $1.48 billion, also below expectations, though revenue increased by 3.1% year-over-year. Insiders sold shares worth $4.13 million in the last quarter, while the company increased its quarterly dividend to $0.75, resulting in an annualized yield of approximately 1.9%.

feed.title: The Bull Case For Texas Roadhouse (TXRH) Could Change Following Strong Comps, Dividend Hike And Unit Volumes
feed.summary: Texas Roadhouse (TXRH) has shown strong performance with positive comparable restaurant sales, a raised quarterly dividend, and high average unit volumes. While these factors support the investment narrative, the company still faces operational risks due to persistent inflation in beef and wages. Forecasts predict significant revenue and earnings growth, leading to a fair value estimate of $196.85, indicating a potential 23% upside.

feed.title: Transdigm Group Incorporated (NYSE:TDG) Receives Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" from Analysts
feed.summary: Transdigm Group Incorporated (NYSE:TDG) has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus recommendation from analysts, with a target price of $1,563.19. The company recently surpassed quarterly earnings and revenue estimates and provided strong FY2026 guidance. Insider trading activity has been mixed, but institutional ownership remains high at nearly 96%.

feed.title: International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (NYSE:IFF) Given Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Analysts
feed.summary: Eighteen analysts have given International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (NYSE:IFF) a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating, with an average 12-month price target of $89.91. This recommendation includes 13 buy, 4 hold, and 1 sell rating from various brokerages. The article also highlights recent insider buying activity, with Director Paul J. Fribourg purchasing 142,000 shares for approximately $9.96 million.

feed.title: Applied Materials, Inc. stock: What you should know now for smart investing
feed.summary: Applied Materials, Inc. is a critical player in the semiconductor industry, supplying essential equipment for chip manufacturing, crucial for AI and tech growth. The company has shown strong financial performance with recent earnings beats and positive analyst upgrades, drawing significant investor attention due to its position in the AI-driven demand for advanced chips. Despite potential cyclical and geopolitical risks, its robust profitability, strategic focus on AI technologies, and institutional confidence suggest a compelling case for long-term investors.

feed.title: Raymond James Upgrade And Earnings Beat Might Change The Case For Investing In CVR Energy (CVI)
feed.summary: Raymond James upgraded CVR Energy (CVI) to Market Perform following an earnings beat in Q4 2025, signaling increased confidence in the company. While this suggests improved sentiment, CVR Energy's investment narrative still involves navigating volatile refining and fertilizer markets, significant regulatory risks, and potentially high valuation based on current earnings. The company recently completed a $1.0 billion refinancing of senior notes, which could impact financial flexibility if margins decline.

feed.title: A Look At Crown Castle (CCI) Valuation After Recent Share Price Swings
feed.summary: Crown Castle (CCI) has seen recent share price fluctuations, with the stock down about 6% over the past month. While some valuation models suggest it is undervalued by approximately 24% with a fair value of $98.81, its high P/E ratio of 33.6x compared to a peer average of 23.6x indicates investors are already paying a premium. The company's decision to sell its fiber segment to focus on its U.S. tower business could unlock value, but a planned dividend cut and churn related to Sprint pose potential risks.

feed.title: Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. (NYSE:SWK) Given Average Rating of "Hold" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. (NYSE:SWK) has received a consensus "Hold" rating from twelve brokerages, with an average 12-month price target of $86.33. The company recently beat EPS estimates but missed revenue forecasts, setting FY2026 guidance. Despite a 4.9% dividend yield, a payout ratio of 125% raises concerns about its sustainability.

feed.title: Agilent Technologies and BaseSolve Informatics partner to offer integrated NGS workflow in the U.S.
feed.summary: Agilent Technologies and BaseSolve Informatics have announced a co-marketing agreement to provide an integrated Next-Generation Sequencing (NGS) workflow solution to customers in the United States. This collaboration combines Agilent's genomics instrumentation and reagents with BaseSolve's bioinformatic analysis and reporting platform, AUGMET, aiming to streamline NGS workflows from sample quality control to data reporting. The focus is on enhancing Whole Exome Sequencing and Whole Transcriptome Sequencing by offering a tested, supported, and optimized solution for both Element and Illumina sequencers.

feed.title: GE HealthCare And Stanford Deepen AI Imaging Ties For Future Products
feed.summary: GE HealthCare Technologies and Stanford Radiology are expanding their collaboration to create a Center of Excellence focused on imaging and advanced AI research, covering multiple modalities like MR, CT, molecular imaging, and pharmaceutical diagnostics. This partnership aims to accelerate the translation of imaging technologies and next-generation diagnostics from research to clinical application. For investors, this collaboration signals GE HealthCare's strategic focus on AI-powered imaging and its potential to drive future product development and differentiate its offerings in the medical technology market.

feed.title: If Silver Is Near A Bottom, The SILJ ETF Offers Value (NYSEARCA:SILJ)
feed.summary: The Amplify Junior Silver Miners ETF (SILJ) has shown strong performance, outperforming silver futures despite a recent correction, indicating significant market interest. Silver's technical breakthrough above its 1980 high signifies a strong long-term bullish trend driven by increasing industrial demand, persistent supply deficits, and positive investor sentiment. However, SILJ also carries risks associated with sector volatility, impacting its overall Seeking Alpha grades despite strong momentum, dividend, and liquidity ratings.

feed.title: Triumph Financial (TFIN) to Release Earnings on Wednesday
feed.summary: Triumph Financial (NYSE:TFIN) is scheduled to release its Q1 2026 earnings after market close on Wednesday, April 15th. Analysts anticipate earnings of $0.14 per share and revenue of $106.883 million. The company's prior quarter results showed an EPS beat of $0.77 against an estimate of $0.29, with revenue of $105.19 million.

feed.title: LPL and Raymond James add $300M+ in advisor assets with new hires
feed.summary: LPL Financial and Raymond James recently expanded their advisor base by adding over $300 million in combined client assets. LPL onboarded Emerald Legacy Advisors, a multi-generational team managing approximately $140 million, while Raymond James recruited Louis M. Romano Jr. of RPK Wealth Group, who manages about $181 million. These moves highlight the ongoing competition for experienced talent in the financial advisory industry and both firms' strategies to enhance planning capabilities and independent advisor channels.

feed.title: Williams Sonoma Is Clearing House on Quality Cookware, Knives, and More — Prices Start at $6
feed.summary: Williams Sonoma is currently holding a clearance sale with significant discounts on cookware, knives, and kitchen tools, with prices starting at $6 and savings up to 61% off. The sale includes popular brands like Le Creuset and ScanPan, as well as unique items for everyday meal prep and entertaining. Shoppers can find deals on everything from bakeware and knife sets to barware and essential kitchen gadgets.
